---
species: "Hemigrapsus sanguineus"
accepted_code: "HESA"
alternate_codes: ["HESN"]
diminutive:
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: "Invasive crab"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Banded legs and small size" 
image: '/header_images/Hemigrapsus_sanguineus.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Fhilip Nuyttens via [WORMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=4424&tid=158417)'
categories:
  - crustaceans
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
  - marsh
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 158417
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** small size, square and flattened shell, bulb like vesicle on the base of the finger on the claw , prefers intertidal zone.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=4424&tid=158417)**
